h512f549dg4642g4adfgbcd2gb56454ecd671: Remember, outsider - you are tolerated more than you are welcome.
h9c6c3753ga261g443cga828g65939eb3fac0: The Rite of Thorns has ceased; it seems you will be allowed to stay - but behave.
h62e99f3fgc102g4cabgb7d5gc83fde59864e: See to your business here quickly - then leave.
hb0b33108gf267g41a6ga486g5f590dfeb0d0: I'm watching you, drow. We all are.
h63f82438gf315g4dbegbc66g66b442b84fa5: Few outsiders are allowed in here - be respectful and do not interfere.
